name: Chicken & Mushrooms Dijon
recipeIngredient: 1 can Campbell's Cream of Mushroom Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. In a skillet, heat 1 tablespoon hot margarine over medium heat. Cook the chicken for 10 minutes or until browned. Remove and set aside.
2. In the same skillet, add the remaining 1 tablespoon hot margarine. Cook the broccoli and mushrooms for 5-7 minutes, stirring often, until tender and all liquid has evaporated.
3. Stir in the cream of mushroom soup, milk, and Dijon mustard. Bring to a boil. Return the chicken to the skillet. Cover and cook over low heat for 5 minutes or until the chicken is no longer pink, stirring occasionally. Serve with noodles.
